title: Close core governance gaps with enforceable routing and validators
goal: Close the 5 governance gaps by adding enforceable authority/evidence indexing, artifact routing, secret scanning, receipt semantics, and finer classification without over-expanding scope.
execution_strategy: Implement in small vertical slices so each new control has schema, contract (if needed), builder/validator, focused tests, and command-map/release integration.

slices.name: plan_note_index baseline
scope: command map and make check wiring

slices.name: runtime scaffold and directory guarantees
scope: bootstrap creates manifests/ receipts/ checkpoints/ reports/

slices.name: integration and migration pass
scope: update README.md AGENTS.md SKILL.md only where behavior changed
migration note for warning mode rollout

validation_matrix: python -m json.tool on added JSON/schema/contract outputs
focused pytest modules for each new surface
git diff --check and clean worktree state
risk_controls: Add new validators orthogonally before touching existing validator logic.
Keep default modes read-only; writer behavior explicitly declared.
Do not make generated indexes mandatory for behavioral proof.
